title: Character Cards
content:
Name – The character’s name and optional version number.
Keywords – Describes race and attributes. May be referenced by rules or abilities.
Melee Stat – Number of **Melee Cards** drawn when fighting in a **Round of Melee**.
Melee Range – Maximum range an enemy must be within to declare it a target of a **Melee Attack**.
Passive Abilities – ‘Always-on’ effects applying bonuses or penalties.
Arcane Abilities – Special abilities taken as actions by discarding energy. They use **Arcane Cards** against a resisting player.
Arcane Stat – Number of **Arcane Cards** drawn when performing an **Arcane Ability**.
Evade Stat – Modifies the number of Arcane Cards an enemy draws when targeting this model.
Faction Symbol – Indicates which faction can take this character (Commonwealth, Dominion, Leshavult, or Shades).
Active Abilities – Simple abilities taken as actions by expending energy.
Base Size – The diameter of the base the character must be placed on.
Energy – Main resource used for actions. Replenished at the start of each turn based on blue dots remaining on the health bar.
Health Boxes – Represent damage a character can suffer before being **Slain**. Fill boxes from right to left as wounds are suffered.
